violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Hamburger sticks were in container on the floor in the inside cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -WetTowels were not stored in sanitizer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Several items in walk in cooler, did not have date marking or description on container.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Aluminum foil on shelf under the grill. It is not smooth and cleanable.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Deep cuts and discoloration on cutting board on line.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. - Staff stated they had not been using 3 step process of wash, rinse, sanitize.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Single use in outside storage shed contained food stored on the floor
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Walls by grill were not smooth and cleanable. There is part of the wall missing. Around the vent, had part of the wall missing.
